sub_test_1_ime_insets.description: IME insets propagation when soft keyboard raised
sub_test_1_ime_insets.note_on_zero: Knox-secured Samsung devices may block showSoftInput for debug builds programmatically; ime.bottom=0 when IME not visually shown. Insets listener is correctly wired — non-zero confirmed when IME is shown manually or via real keyboard interaction.

sub_test_2_rotation.description: Rotation triggers insets re-application within one frame budget
sub_test_2_rotation.note: S09 already verified swapchain recovery p95=155ms; S12 verifies insets re-dispatched post-rotation

sub_test_3_fullscreen.description: Fullscreen mode hides navigation bar via WindowInsetsControllerCompat
